case_title: SILVER ARROW REMODEL & RESTORATION, INC. ET AL VS. BRUCE PULLEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY SILVER ARROW REMODEL & RESTORATION, INC. MENDOZA, CHRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT PULLEN, BRUCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PULLEN, BRUCE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVER ARROW REMODEL & RESTORATION, INC. MENDOZA, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PULLEN, BRUCE $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,230.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILVER ARROW REMODEL & RESTORATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO OCT-31-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMLEY SERVICE. PLAINTIFF SILVER ARROW REMODEL & RESTORATION, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CRISTINA CHAVEZ DELGADO, VICE PRESIDENT. MS. CHAVEZ IS ALSO PRESENT OH HIS OWN BEHALF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT.
